scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test:ci --prefix client && npm run test --prefix server
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit --prefix client && npm run test:unit --prefix server
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration --prefix client && npm run test:integration --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
